description_long: This object is a large, flat patch of sand with a uniform, fine-grained texture and a light tan coloration. The surface appears even and undisturbed, with no visible debris, footprints, or irregularities. The sand is densely packed, giving it a slightly matte and rough appearance, typical of sand found in urban parks or playgrounds. The edges of the patch are straight and well-defined, suggesting it is intentionally placed or maintained. There are no visible transitions to other materials, indicating the sand patch is isolated from its surroundings. The overall look is clean and consistent, suitable for use in urban recreational or landscaped environments.
description: A large, flat, light tan sand patch with a uniform, fine-grained texture and clean, well-defined edges. The surface is even, matte, and free of debris or disturbance.
description_view_0: A wide, flat expanse of light tan sand with a uniform texture and straight, well-defined front edge.
description_view_1: The sand patch appears equally flat and uniform, with the rear edge visible and no change in texture or color.
description_view_2: A similar view to the front, showing the consistent, even surface and straight edge of the sand patch.
description_view_3: The sand patch remains flat and featureless, with the opposite edge visible and no visible variation in texture.
attribute_location: urban park, playground, or landscaped area
attribute_boundary_definition: The boundaries are straight and well-defined, with sharp transitions to the surrounding area and no blending.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: The sand patch appears visually isolated, with no blending or integration into adjacent surfaces.
